title: zyrphelis fruticosa
intro: Zyrphelis fruticosa, also known as the Cape Flats zyphelis, is a type of shrub native to the southwestern region of South Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zyrphelis fruticosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Zyrphelis fruticosa are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
